task_spec.objective: Read the injected Active Topic Context from the system prompt and classify the relation + risk level of the current message relative to the active topic.
constraints: Topic context is injected by plugin (not MCP call) — read from system prompt cached prefix
One-turn delay: first message of session has no injection, default to continue/low
Risk level determines behavior: low=silent, medium=one-line note, high=suggest fork/switch/reset
success_conditions: Returns an object with relation (string) and risk (string)
relation is one of: continue, fork, switch, merge, archive, reset, bridge
risk is one of: low, medium, high
switch → high risk, fork → medium risk, continue → low risk
non_goals: Does not call topic_detect MCP (plugin already handles injection)
Does not modify topic state (that requires explicit user request)
Does not handle merge/archive/bridge confidence checks (those need user confirmation)

admissible: Injected ## Focus block from system prompt
unknown_state: Whether the MCP server is connected (disk mode may apply)

blocked_outputs: relation not in the 7 admissible values
switch relation with risk=low (switch is always high)
continue relation with risk=high (continue is always low)

carried_obligations_to_successors: If risk=high, downstream steps must pause and suggest fork/switch/reset before proceeding

known_bad_fixtures.intended_reason: Clear switch signal but classified as continue
switch relation but risk=low — switch is always high

on_violation.contract_revision: Add missing keyword to the matching relation pattern
Clamp risk to nearest valid value

admission.composition_interface: output.predicted_risk feeds step1.5-failure-signal (high risk pauses downstream)
